en.cmd.toggle_compose_desc: Toggle compose/preview mode for current buffer (soft wrapping, centered margins)
en.cmd.toggle_compose_all_desc: Toggle compose/preview mode for all open and future markdown files
en.cmd.set_compose_width_desc: Set the width for compose mode wrapping and margins
en.status.invalid_width: Invalid width - must be between 20 and 300
en.status.width_none: Markdown compose width: using viewport width

cs.cmd.toggle_compose_desc: Prepnout rezim compose/preview pro aktualni buffer (mekke zalamovani, vycentrovane okraje)
cs.cmd.toggle_compose_all_desc: Prepnout rezim compose/preview pro vsechny otevrene a budouci soubory markdown
cs.cmd.set_compose_width_desc: Nastavit sirku zalamovani a okraju pro rezim psani
cs.status.invalid_width: Neplatna sirka - musi byt mezi 20 a 300
cs.status.width_none: Sirka Markdown psani: pouziva sirku okna

de.cmd.toggle_compose_desc: Compose/Preview-Modus fur aktuellen Buffer umschalten (weicher Umbruch, zentrierte Rander)
de.cmd.toggle_compose_all_desc: Compose/Preview-Modus fur alle offenen und zukunftigen Markdown-Dateien umschalten
de.cmd.set_compose_width_desc: Breite fur Umbruch und Rander im Kompositionsmodus festlegen
de.status.invalid_width: Ungultige Breite - muss zwischen 20 und 300 liegen

es.cmd.toggle_compose_desc: Alternar modo compose/preview para el buffer actual (ajuste suave, margenes centrados)
es.cmd.toggle_compose_all_desc: Alternar modo compose/preview para todos los archivos markdown abiertos y futuros
es.cmd.set_compose_width_desc: Establecer el ancho para el ajuste y margenes del modo de composicion
es.status.width_set: Ancho de composicion Markdown establecido en %{width}
es.status.invalid_width: Ancho invalido - debe estar entre 20 y 300
es.status.width_none: Ancho de composicion Markdown: usando ancho de ventana

fr.cmd.toggle_compose_desc: Basculer le mode compose/preview pour le buffer actuel (retour a la ligne souple, marges centrees)
fr.cmd.toggle_compose_all_desc: Basculer le mode compose/preview pour tous les fichiers markdown ouverts et futurs
fr.cmd.set_compose_width: Markdown: Definir la Largeur de Composition

fr.status.not_markdown_file: Ce n'est pas un fichier Markdown
fr.status.width_set: Largeur de composition Markdown definie a %{width}
fr.status.invalid_width: Largeur invalide - doit etre entre 20 et 300
fr.status.width_none: Largeur de composition Markdown: utilise la largeur de la fenetre
fr.suggestion.none: Utiliser la largeur de la fenetre

it.cmd.toggle_compose_desc: Alterna la modalita compose/preview per il buffer corrente (a capo automatico, margini centrati)
it.cmd.toggle_compose_all_desc: Alterna la modalita compose/preview per tutti i file markdown aperti e futuri
it.cmd.set_compose_width_desc: Imposta la larghezza per l'andata a capo e i margini della modalità composizione
it.status.compose_on: Composizione Markdown: ON (a capo automatico, centrato)
it.status.invalid_width: Larghezza non valida - deve essere compresa tra 20 e 300
it.status.width_none: Larghezza composizione Markdown: usa la larghezza della finestra
